props.ChoiceText: Long rides, uncertain roads, and sudden decisions taught you what mounted authority feels like far from command.
props.ChoiceBio: Border patrol made distance, uncertainty, and armed discretion part of your daily trade.

0.TransitionText: Because border patrol made distance, uncertainty, and armed discretion part of your daily trade, horseflesh, speed, and shock remained your proper element.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cavalry, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because border patrol made distance, uncertainty, and armed discretion part of your daily trade, mounted reputation ripened into command.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Officer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because border patrol made distance, uncertainty, and armed discretion part of your daily trade, high war gave way to lower but more immediate pay.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.
